title: calycophysum pedunculatum
intro: Calycophysum pedunculatum, also known as the 'Purple Coral Bush', is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat various conditions including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Calycophysum pedunculatum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent to extract its active compounds.
